case_title: DENTA TADESSE VS. SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,394.00 FILED BY TADESSE, DENTA AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-16-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TADESSE, DENTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P. $8,765.47 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,765.47, AMOUNT TO BE CREDITED TO PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNT WITH DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TADESSE, DENTA AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.
************ NO MORE CONTINUANCES FOR BOTH PARTIES, PER JUDGE MITCHELL **********.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TADESSE, DENTA AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-23-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBIN WILLIAMS--STORE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TADESSE, DENTA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF TADESSE, DENTA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-06-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-18-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF WANTS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO INCREASE THE AMOUNT OF HIS CLAIM. NO MORE CONTINUANCES FOR BOTH PARTIES", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE THE DEFENDANTS PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBIN WILLIAMS--STORE MANAGER AND TRIEU TRAN--STORE MANAGEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBIN WILLIAMS--RETAIL CONSULTANT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
